case_title: THOMPSON, ROBERT vs. BARLING, BENJAMIN et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, ROBERT COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-09-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/CLIFFORD FRIED AS COUNSEL. DEF. NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. PL. WIT, ROB'T THOMPSON, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, 3 DAY NOTICE, ID. PL. EXH.#2, RENTAL AGREEMENT, ID. PL. EXH.#3, DECL. OF MR. EHRSEMAN, ID PL. EXH.#4, DECL OF MR. WEIGLE, ID. PL. EXH.#5, DECL. OF MS THOMPSON, ID. ALL EXH. MOVED INTO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 243 DORLAND,#4, S.F, CA. - $877.50 RENT & DAMAGES - COSTS PER COST BILL - ATTY FEES PURS TO RENTAL CONTRACT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARLING, BENJAMIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 246 DORLAND ST, #4, S.F, CA. $877.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $877.50, COST PER COST BILL. ATTY. FEES PURS TO RENTAL CONTRACT. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
